creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
This could be a problem with Netscape's settings getting corrupt, but
I have no experience with the Composer. I have experienced Netscape
constantly crashing, and the only way to get it stable again is to
delete (or move away) the ~/.netscape dir and start over with fresh
settings. It might be worth a try.

Good luck!
-- 
Palle
